regulation_name: Health Promotion Act (Foods with Function Claims)
citation: Health Promotion Act — FFC Notification Requirements
summary: Foods with Function Claims must use only notified claim wording; other health foods must avoid disease-related claims.
review_guidance: TRIGGER: FFC, nutraceutical, or general food health benefit claims. ACTION: WARN — match notified claim text exactly. CHECK: Consumer Affairs Agency notification number and claim scope. ESCALATE IF: Disease treatment or unnotified function claim.
